notes: The hive adaptor is a SQL database client (JDBC/Thrift; config is host/port/database/username/password) with a single public operation query(sql). It has no REST/HTTP API, so this spec is synthesized from the adaptor surface: the query interaction is modeled as POST /query returning a tabular QueryResult (columns + rows). Server URL is a mock placeholder. QueryRow uses additionalProperties since result columns are statement-dependent.
